content.query:
--Normal View

CREATE VIEW bank_schema.vw_banktxndata
AS
select * from bank_schema.bank_txns where region = 'Chennai';

select * from bank_schema.vw_banktxndata;

--Materialized View
CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW bank_schema.vw_banktxndata_m
WITH (DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN)
AS
SELECT 
    region, 
    SUM(amt) AS total_amt,
    COUNT_BIG(*) AS txncount,      -- Counts all rows in the group
    COUNT_BIG(amt) AS amt_count    -- Counts only non-null values of 'amt'
FROM bank_schema.bank_txns 
GROUP BY region;

select * from  bank_schema.vw_banktxndata_m;

select  region, SUM(amt) AS total_amt from bank_schema.bank_txns GROUP BY region;
